title: taraxacum armatifrons
intro: Taraxacum armatifrons, also known as the crested dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues and liver problems due to its bitter compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits of Taraxacum armatifrons include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve bloating and gas, and support liver function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum armatifrons can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
